memoryArtifacts.headline: tree_Sullivan_Family_Sheet
memoryArtifacts.description:
This family sheet was found in papers of Mildred Evelyn Sullivan LNKH-8PV a granddaugher of Delos.

It was created by her brother Orville Oscar  Sullivan L6L2-JJB who had done a great deal of searching for ancestors. 

Many of the children of Delos appear to have had children.  None were entered at this time (7 July 2020) as I do not know their status

Nte that for Fay William the birth is Sept 21 not 2

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Louisa Vinton於1839年1月出生在美國俄亥俄州奧加時，她的父親Franklin Vinton21歲，母親Olive Rarick20歲。她於1861年2月13日與William M Sullivan在美國密西根州貝里恩貝里恩 堂史普結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1895年住在美國愛阿華州法也特且於1900年住在美國愛阿華州法也特埃爾金。她去世於1902年1月3日在美國愛阿華州法也特布萊納德享年63歲，埋葬在美國愛阿華州法也特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Louisa Vinton于1839年1月出生在美国俄亥俄州奧加时，她的父亲Franklin Vinton21岁，母亲Olive Rarick20岁。她于1861年2月13日与William M Sullivan在美国密歇根州貝里恩貝里恩 堂史普结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她于1895年住在美国艾奥瓦州法也特且于1900年住在美国艾奥瓦州法也特埃爾金。她去世于1902年1月3日在美国艾奥瓦州法也特布萊納德享年63岁，埋葬在美国艾奥瓦州法也特。

nameMeanings.name: Vinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Finton   with voicing of the initial consonant (see   Fenton  ). In Sussex and Kent the name was probably confused with   Winton  .

variants.name: Finton
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Fenton  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Louisa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Louis  , commonly used as an English given name since the 18th century.

historicEvents.description: U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Historical Boundaries: 1849: Fayette, Iowa, United States

historicEvents.title: Ohio supports the Union side of the Civil War
historicEvents.description: Although divided as a state on the subject of slavery, Ohio participated in the Civil War on the Union's side, providing over 300,000 troops. Ohio provided the 3rd largest number of troops by any Union state.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Ohio supports the Union side of the Civil War

historicEvents.description: Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: The First National Park
historicEvents.description: Yellowstone National Park was given the title of the first national park by the U.S. Congress and signed into law by President Ulysses S. Grant. It is also believed to be the first national park in the world.
Historical Boundaries: 1874: Fayette, Iowa, United States

historicEvents.title: The Sherman Antitrust Act
historicEvents.description: This Act tried to prevent the raising of prices by restricting trade. The purpose of the Act was to preserve a competitive marketplace to protect consumers from abuse.

historicEvents.title: Woman's Suffrage
historicEvents.description: An organization formed in favor of women's suffrages. By combining the National Woman Suffrage Association and the American Woman Suffrage Association, the NAWSA eventually increased in membership up to two million people. It is still one of the largest voluntary organizations in the nation today and held a major role in passing the Nineteenth Amendment.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The National American Woman Suffrage Association

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Louisa Vinton was born in January 1839, in Geauga, Ohio, United States, her father, Franklin Vinton, was 21 and her mother, Olive Rarick, was 20. She married William M Sullivan on 13 February 1861, in Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She lived in Fayette, Iowa, United States in 1895 and Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, United States in 1900. She died on 3 January 1902, in Brainard, Fayette, Iowa, United States, at the age of 63, and was buried in Fayette, Iowa, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Louisa Vinton est née en janvier 1839, à Geauga, Ohio, États-Unis, son père, Franklin Vinton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Olive Rarick, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William M Sullivan le 13 février 1861, à Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle a vécu à Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis en 1895 et à Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis en 1900. Elle est décédée le 3 janvier 1902, à Brainard, Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Louisa Vinton im Januar 1839 in Geauga, Ohio, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Franklin Vinton 21 und ihre Mutter Olive Rarick 20. Sie hat am 13. Februar 1861 in Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, Vereinigte Staaten William M Sullivan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1895 hat sie in Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten und 1900 in Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 3. Januar 1902 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Brainard, Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Louisa Vinton è nata il nel gennaio 1839 nel Geauga, Ohio, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Franklin Vinton, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Olive Rarick, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William M Sullivan il 13 febbraio 1861, nel Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1895 e nel Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1900. Morì il 3 gennaio 1902, nel Brainard, Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Galien, Berrien, Michigan, United States: アメリカ合衆国ミシガン州バーリーンガリーン トウンシュイップガリーン
ja.Tama, Iowa, United States: アメリカ合衆国アイオワ州タマ
ja.Fayette, Iowa, United States: アメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエット
ja.lifeSummary: Mary Louisa Vintonが1839年1月にアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州ジェアウガで生まれた時，父Franklin Vintonは21歳，母Olive Rarickは20歳であった。1861年2月13日にアメリカ合衆国ミシガン州バーリーンバーリーン トウンシュイップでWilliam M Sullivanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1895年にはアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットに，1900年にはアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットエルジンに住んでいた。彼女は1902年1月3日にアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットブレイナルドで63歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットにて埋葬された。

ko.Pleasant Valley, Fayette, Iowa: 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 플리산트 발리 타운시프
ko.Noble, Wabash, Indiana: 미국 인디애나 주 와바시 노블일 타운시프
ko.Berrien, Michigan: 미국 미시간 주 베리 베리 타운시프
ko.Galien, Berrien, Michigan, United States: 미국 미시간 주 베리 갈리 타운시프 갈리
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Louisa Vinton(이)가 1839년 1월 미국 오하이오 주 그이가에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Franklin Vinton(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Olive Rarick(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1861년 2월 13일 미국 미시간 주 베리 베리 타운시프에서 William M Sullivan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1895년도에 미국 아이오와 주 파예트에서, 1900년도에 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 엘긴에서 살았다. 그녀는 1902년 1월 3일 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 브레이나르드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아이오와 주 파예트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Louisa Vinton nasceu em janeiro de 1839, em Geauga, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Franklin Vinton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Olive Rarick, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William M Sullivan em 13 de fevereiro de 1861, em Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela viveu em Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América em 1895 e em Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América em 1900. Ela faleceu em 3 de janeiro de 1902, em Brainard, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Noble, Wabash, Indiana: нобл тоуншип, вабаш, Индиана, Соединенные штаты

ru.Galien, Berrien, Michigan, United States: галиен, галиен тоуншип, бирриен, Мичиган, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Louisa Vinton родилась январь 1839 г. в местности джога, Огайо, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Franklin Vinton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Olive Rarick, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William M Sullivan 13 февраля 1861 г. в местности бирриен тоуншип, бирриен, Мичиган, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она жила в местности феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты в 1895 году и в местности элгин, феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты в 1900 году. Она умерла 3 января 1902 г. в местности бреинард, феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Louisa Vinton nació en enero de 1839, en Geauga, Ohio, Estados Unidos, su papá, Franklin Vinton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Olive Rarick, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William M Sullivan el 13 de febrero de 1861, en Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos en 1895 y en Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos en 1900. Murió el 3 de enero de 1902, en Brainard, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos.
